name: num-style-link
description: abstractNum 0 has numStyleLink='OutlineNumbering'. Style 'OutlineNumbering' (type=numbering) has numPr -> numId=2. abstractNum 1 has styleLink='OutlineNumbering' with actual levels. Paragraphs using numId=1 should follow the chain.
expected_behavior: Paragraphs using numId=1: '1.', '2.', 'a)'. The numStyleLink chain is followed to get actual level definitions.
